a:r.a:t: AR Intelligence – Hack and build Phase
into the CFO value chain to transform period-end accrual management from a reactive manual process into a proactive , data- driven close operation
Unified Accrual Dataset for planning and forecasting
Detection of unrecorded expenses and services received
Suggested accrual amount based on historical and transactional patterns
Business area ,vendor and cost center level insights
Recommended accrual journals and supporting evidence
Clean accrual Dataset for period-end close
Automated accrual monitoring and reconciliation support
AI assisted accrual forecasting and expense trend analysis
Cash flow impact simulation of pending accruals
Automated identification of missing accrual candidates
AI – driven accrual recommendation from unmatched GR/IR items
Aging and prioritization of unresolved accrual items
Intelligent accrual worklist with exception prioritization
| | Natural language accrual investigation using Joule | | Self Learning accrual optimization |
Future – Auto posting of accruals via BAPI
Future – Automated accrual creation and posting in SAP using BAPI integration
Future – Automated accrual monitoring & reconciliation support
